examples: She's brushing up on her math skills.
They're brushing up on their presentation skills.
He brushed up on the company policies.
Let's brush up on the rules before playing.
I need to brush up on my Spanish before the trip.
example_translate: Он освежил знания о политике компании.
Мне нужно освежить свой испанский перед поездкой.
brush up on.synonyms: Освежать знания, повторять - review, refresh, revise
